problem id: 40400f33
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) XOR NOT SHL(1)) OR SHR(1)

examples:
  01110001 -> 10111110
  01110000 -> 10111100
  01111001 -> 11111110
  10111110 -> 01111111
  00001101 -> 10001111
  11010000 -> 11111001
  11110101 -> 11111010
  10001111 -> 11011111
  10010111 -> 01101111

query: 10000001
predicted answer: 11110001
